RuleSet.Name: schema/dbcreate/db2luw/crsp_next_tableidgen.sql
RuleSet.GenFile: -- -- @(#) $GenPackageDir$/$GenFileName$ $MssDoubleDashScriptLicense$ create or replace procedure $sp_next_tableidgen$( \\ $reference Dispenser reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( first sparg_TableCol each sparg_CommaTableCol )$, \\ out NextId smallint ) \\ modifies sql data \\ language sql \\ begin \\ begin atomic \\ if not exists ( \\ select * \\ from $lower DbSchemaName$.$lower reference Dispenser DbTableName$_idg16 \\ where slice_id = $Slice$$reference Dispenser reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( each CreateSPNextTableIdGenPassExistsArg )$ ) \\ then \\ insert into $lower DbSchemaName$.$lower reference Dispenser DbTableName$_idg16 ($reference Dispenser reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( each CreateSPNextTableIdGenInsertCol )$ \\ slice_id, \\ next_id ) \\ values ($reference Dispenser reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( each CreateSPNextTableIdGenInsertArg )$ \\ $Slice$, \\ 1 ); \\ end if; \\ \\ select next_id \\ into NextId \\ from $lower DbSchemaName$.$lower reference Dispenser DbTableName$_idg16 \\ where slice_id = $Slice$$reference Dispenser reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( each CreateSPNextTableIdGenPassWhereArg )$ \\ for update; \\ \\ update $lower DbSchemaName$.$lower reference Dispenser DbTableName$_idg16 \\ set next_id = NextId + 1 \\ where slice_id = $Slice$$reference Dispenser reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( each CreateSPNextTableIdGenPassWhereArg )$; \\ end; \\ end

-- -- @(#) $GenPackageDir$/$GenFileName$ $MssDoubleDashScriptLicense$ create or replace procedure $sp_next_tableidgen$( \\ $reference Dispenser reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( first sparg_TableCol each sparg_CommaTableCol )$, \\ out NextId int ) \\ modifies sql data \\ language sql \\ begin \\ begin atomic \\ if not exists ( \\ select * \\ from $lower DbSchemaName$.$lower reference Dispenser DbTableName$_idg32 \\ where slice_id = $Slice$$reference Dispenser reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( each CreateSPNextTableIdGenPassExistsArg )$ ) \\ then \\ insert into $lower DbSchemaName$.$lower reference Dispenser DbTableName$_idg32 ($reference Dispenser reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( each CreateSPNextTableIdGenInsertCol )$ \\ slice_id, \\ next_id ) \\ values ($reference Dispenser reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( each CreateSPNextTableIdGenInsertArg )$ \\ $Slice$, \\ 1 ); \\ end if; \\ \\ select next_id \\ into NextId \\ from $lower DbSchemaName$.$lower reference Dispenser DbTableName$_idg32 \\ where slice_id = $Slice$$reference Dispenser reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( each CreateSPNextTableIdGenPassWhereArg )$ \\ for update; \\ \\ update $lower DbSchemaName$.$lower reference Dispenser DbTableName$_idg32 \\ set next_id = NextId + 1 \\ where slice_id = $Slice$$reference Dispenser reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( each CreateSPNextTableIdGenPassWhereArg )$; \\ end; \\ end

-- -- @(#) $GenPackageDir$/$GenFileName$ $MssDoubleDashScriptLicense$ create or replace procedure $sp_next_tableidgen$( \\ $reference Dispenser reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( first sparg_TableCol each sparg_CommaTableCol )$, \\ out NextId bigint ) \\ modifies sql data \\ language sql \\ begin \\ begin atomic \\ if not exists ( \\ select * \\ from $lower DbSchemaName$.$lower reference Dispenser DbTableName$_idg64 \\ where slice_id = $Slice$$reference Dispenser reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( each CreateSPNextTableIdGenPassExistsArg )$ ) \\ then \\ insert into $lower DbSchemaName$.$lower reference Dispenser DbTableName$_idg64 ($reference Dispenser reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( each CreateSPNextTableIdGenInsertCol )$ \\ slice_id, \\ next_id ) \\ values ($reference Dispenser reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( each CreateSPNextTableIdGenInsertArg )$ \\ $Slice$, \\ 1 ); \\ end if; \\ \\ select next_id \\ into NextId \\ from $lower DbSchemaName$.$lower reference Dispenser DbTableName$_idg64 \\ where slice_id = $Slice$$reference Dispenser reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( each CreateSPNextTableIdGenPassWhereArg )$ \\ for update; \\ \\ update $lower DbSchemaName$.$lower reference Dispenser DbTableName$_idg64 \\ set next_id = NextId + 1 \\ where slice_id = $Slice$$reference Dispenser reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( each CreateSPNextTableIdGenPassWhereArg )$; \\ end; \\ end
